title: Vagabond
description: Answer a few questions and find the perfect city for your vacation!

quiz.loading: Analyzing your answers... AI is searching for your perfect destination 🧠
quiz.email_form_title: 📧 To discover the perfect city and receive your complete practical guide
quiz.perfect_match: We found the perfect city for you! ✨

quiz.error_api: We couldn't determine your ideal destination. Please try again later.

quiz.intro_text: In just {{questionCount}} questions, our AI will analyze your traveler profile and recommend the perfect destination for your next vacation.

quick.title: Quick
quick.description: 2 minutes to discover your ideal destination

custom.title: Customized
custom.description: A recommendation based on your unique preferences

magic.title: Magical
magic.description: Let yourself be surprised by our AI's relevance

continent.question: 🌍 Which part of the world do you dream of exploring this summer?

action_level.question: 🏃‍♀️ When it comes to action, you're more like...

options.max: 💪 Full-on active: hiking, biking, kayaking, climbing... I love to move!
options.high: 🌊 Quite active: water sports, fun or unusual activities
options.low: 😌 Total chill: deckchair, book, nap, no plans!

nightlife_level.question: ✨ What's your ideal vacation nightlife vibe?

options.max: 🎉 I need to party every night
options.high: 🍹 I like going out and having fun some nights
options.medium: 😎 A few chill things here and there, at my own pace
options.low: 🛌🏻 No pressure, I just want to relax

options.art: 🎨 Art & culture: museums, exhibits, street art, creative neighborhoods
options.history: 🏛️ History: castles, ancient ruins, iconic landmarks
options.local: 🕌 Local life: traditions, markets, religion, daily life

environment.question: 💭 What kind of environment do you prefer?

food_importance.question: 🍽️ How important is food in your trip?

options.high: 🍣 Essential, I love trying local specialties
options.medium: 🥗 Important, but not my main focus
options.low: 🥪 Not very important, I’ll eat whatever’s around

duration.question: ⏱️ How long are you planning to travel?
